summary: Backend-only re-test for AFIFA iteration 2. Ran the same 16 pytest cases against EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (https://afifa-assistant.preview.emergentagent.com). 16/16 PASS (100%). All 9 previously-passing non-LLM CRUD flows remain green (health, auth/guest+me, missing-token 401, profile GET+PUT with wake_word auto-update, chat/models, memory CRUD, calendar CRUD, automation rule CRUD+queue). All 7 previously-failing LLM-backed flows now PASS: POST /api/chat/conversations/{id}/messages returns a real assistant_message with model attribution; POST /api/jobs/analyze-resume and /api/jobs/cover-letter return non-empty content; /api/code/run (generate) returns output; /api/prompts/generate returns a string prompt; /api/documents/generate returns a document with content; /api/email/draft and /api/email/summarize both return content. /api/voice/tts now returns a valid base64-encoded mp3 (>500 bytes) — the previous direct-OpenAI 401 is gone (now uses emergentintegrations OpenAITextToSpeech via the Emergent proxy). Total runtime 42.18s.

minor.issue: Not exercised in this run because it requires a stable audio sample upload. Code path now uses emergentintegrations.OpenAISpeechToText per main agent's note — manual smoke test recommended once a small mp3/wav fixture is available.
Still creates a fresh guest user on EVERY call with no TTL/cleanup. Not blocking but the users collection will grow unbounded under load.

action_items: (Optional) Add a /api/voice/transcribe regression test using a small bundled mp3/wav fixture to cover the STT path end-to-end.
(Optional) Add light rate-limiting or upsert on /api/auth/guest to prevent unbounded user growth.
critical_code_review_comments: All three iteration-1 root causes are confirmed fixed: (a) MODEL_REGISTRY/default model now resolves to a real model (gpt-4o-mini), (b) llm_complete() session_id is now keyword-only so positional misuse is no longer possible, (c) voice TTS routes through emergentintegrations instead of api.openai.com directly.
server.py is still large (>1100 lines) — consider modular split per-router once features stabilize. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates a fresh guest user via /api/auth/guest with a TEST_<hex> name prefix. All test-created memory/jobs/prompts/documents/calendar/automation items are deleted at end of their respective tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green (16/16). For future iterations, the only uncovered path on the backend is /api/voice/transcribe (Whisper STT) — needs an audio fixture. Frontend has not been tested; if frontend testing is requested, use mobile viewport (375x667) and target Expo web preview at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL with testID-based selectors.
rca_of_issue: N/A — iteration 1 issues all resolved. Verification: (1) chat send now returns assistant_message with non-empty content and model field; (2) jobs/code/prompts/documents/email LLM endpoints all return 200 with populated content fields; (3) voice/tts returns audio_base64 that decodes to >500 bytes of binary, confirming emergentintegrations OpenAITextToSpeech path is working with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
